Brown Rot.name: Cevya
Brown Rot.description: Do not make more than 2 sequential applications. Wait 7-14 days for additional application.

Leaf Curl.name: Bravo ZNC
Leaf Curl.description: Do not apply Bravo after shuck split. Use higher rate for trees over 6 m in height. Refer to label for specific REI's for thinning activities.

Leaf Curl.name: Copper Spray
Leaf Curl.description: Apply at 75-100% leaf drop during dry weather. A spring dormant spray may also be required.

Twig Borer.name: Harvanta 50SL
Twig Borer.description: Toxic to bees. Do not make more than 3 applications per crop year. Where possible, rotate the use of Harvanta or other Group 28 insecticides with different groups that control the same pests.

Twig Borer.name: Decis
Twig Borer.description: Decis is harmful to beneficial insects and mites. Residual control: 10 days/

Mildew.name: Fontelis
Mildew.description: Do not apply more than 2 times per season. Use high rate for high disease pressure.

Mildew.name: Nova
Mildew.description: Limit use of group 3 fungicides (Indar, Nova, Topas, Jade, Tilt, Quash) to 2 sprays/season. Rotate with fungicides from other groups for resistance management. 12 days REI for thinning.
